task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Redmine as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Logged in as admin' or the username 'admin' in the top right corner of the Redmine interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the correct project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Phoenix E-Commerce Platform' in the project header or navigation menu, indicating it is the active project.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tracker and Subject fields are filled out correctly in the New Issue form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tracker dropdown set to 'Bug' and the Subject text field containing 'Cart total incorrect after applying coupon code'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Description field contains the correct bug details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Description textarea containing the text starting with 'When a percentage-based coupon code is applied...' and ending with '...mismatch of $8-12 on average order values.'

task_completion.description: Verify the Priority, Assignee, and Category fields are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Priority dropdown set to 'High', the Assignee dropdown set to 'Bob Walker', and the Category dropdown set to 'Backend'.

task_completion.description: Verify the issue was actually submitted and created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green success flash message (e.g., 'Issue #... created.') or the final read-only view of the created issue displaying all the correct details.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Firefox browser to interact with Redmine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox browser window containing the Redmine web interface, rather than terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the form rather than just filling it out.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of a page load after form filling, such as the issue view page or a success notification, rather than just the filled-out 'New Issue' form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the actual Redmine application UI, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project is 'Phoenix E-Commerce Platform' (system identifier: phoenix-ecommerce). The issue must be created with the subject 'Cart total incorrect after applying coupon code', tracker 'Bug', priority 'High', and assignee 'Bob Walker' (user login: bob.walker).
